versions.version_description: Revised and simplified chord structure, capo retains song's original key.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
the [ch]E#m7[/ch] sounds better when replaced with a [ch]Bm[/ch]...its just faster with the [ch]E#m7[/ch]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]E#m7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
May-be it's in-tu-i-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]E#m7[/ch]
But some things you just don't ques-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Like in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]E#m7[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
I see my fu-ture in an in-stant[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]
And there it goes[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]Am7[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]D[/ch]
I think I've found my best friend[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]E#m7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]
I know that it might sound more than a lit-tle cra-zy[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E#m7[/ch]   [ch]C2[/ch]
But I be-lieve[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]                                                             down one
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I think I dreamed you in-to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C2[/ch]
I have been wait-ing all my life[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]E#m7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
There's just no rhyme or rea-son[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]E#m7[/ch]
On-ly this sense of com-ple-tion[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
And in your eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]        [ch]E#m7[/ch]
I see the miss-ing pie-ces[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I'm seaching for[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]D[/ch]
I think I've found my way home[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am7[/ch]          [ch]E#m7[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]
I know that it might sound more than a lit-tle cra-zy[/tab]
[tab] [ch]E#m7[/ch]   [ch]C9[/ch]
But I be-lieve[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
I think I dreamed you in-to life[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you[/tab]
[tab][ch]D[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
I have been wait-ing all my life[/tab]


[Bridge]
(same as chorus)

ooooh   ooh     aaaaah
A thous-and ang-els dance a-round you
ooooh   ooh     aaaaah
I am com-plete now that I've found you


[Chorus]
(same as the first one)
   
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you
I think I dreamed you in-to life
I knew I loved you before I met you
I have been waiting all my life


[Outro]

Capo 1.

I knew I loved you be-fore I met you
I think I dreamed you in-to life
I knew I loved you be-fore I met you
I knew I loved
I knew I loved


CHORDS

        EADGBe
[ch]A[/ch]       x02220
[ch]Bm7[/ch]     022432
[ch]C#m7[/ch]    044654
[ch]D[/ch]       xx0232
[ch]D2[/ch]      xx0230
[ch]E[/ch]       022100
[ch]F#m[/ch]     244222 or xx4222
[ch]F#m[/ch]/[ch]E[/ch]  xx2222
